name: ci
trigger: a failed workflow run on main -- the cheapest, highest-value observer; dedup per run id so each failure files once. Edit --branch in query_cmd if this repo's main branch is named differently.
env_doc: No env var: gh manages its own auth (gh auth login, or GH_TOKEN in gh's standard environment). If gh is absent the run is a logged skip.
query_cmd: gh run list --branch main --status failure --limit 10 --json databaseId,displayTitle,url,createdAt | python3 rails/observers/extract.py ci
